meaning: n.[古生]笔石(古元脊椎动物,现存化石)
examples: The graptolite fauna belongs to the Zhujiang sub-form of Huanan form with typical characteristics of the Pacific graptolite fauna.
The optical anisotropy of zooclast graptolite in some Paleozoic strata of China has been studied using reflectance cross-plot analysis.
The nature of graptolite fauna, the correlation of the graptolite-bearing strata with that in other area and the Cambrian-Ordovician boundary are also discussed.
